# Add structured tax process management

## Summary

Implement a structured tax process so yearly or topic-based tax work is handled as an explicit workflow instead of only as a cross-domain container.

## Why

Tax containers are useful for grouping records, but they do not fully describe completeness, review state, deadlines, or handoff readiness.

## Scope

- define tax cases by year or topic
- define tax-relevant links to transactions, documents, and contracts
- define completeness and review states
- define tax-related tasks and deadlines
- define prepared exports or handoff views

## Acceptance Criteria

- tax case requirements are documented
- completeness and review concepts are explicit
- deadline and task requirements are included
- export or handoff expectations are documented
